title: [Pink] Kerfur Omega Totem
description: Transforms your totem model to Pink Kerfur-Omega from VOTV (Voices of the Void)
body:
![Meow :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1qWnbq71/images/8bb78c0ba2115aec00df3d5802916e4083daa38c.png)

This resource pack transforms your totem model into Pink Kerfur-Omega from VOTV (Voices of the Void) :3

## Compatibility with the resource pack:

| Version             | Mods               | Result              |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Vanilla            | -              | ✅            |
| [Forge](<https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/> 'HELLO,')            | [Optifine](<https://optifine.net/downloads> 'I')              | ✅             |
| [Fabric](<https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/> 'NOT')            | [CIT Resewn](<https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions>  'MURKA!')              | ✅             |

## Other:

The map from the first screenshot: [Click :3](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/voices-of-the-void-the-observatory-from-0-6-3/)

Original model creator: [YellowFire](https://boosty.to/yellowfire)

My Telegram Channel: [Click :3](<https://t.me/mur_live>  'Mur... :3') 

If you have any questions, do not hesitate and write to me in [Telegram](https://t.me/MuralovTY)/[Discord](https://discord.com/users/938167587727114302): muralovty
